item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I’m Cyrus Kalafchi. I’m currently studying Computer Science and Philosophy at the University of British Columbia, with a deep interest in the intersection between technology and society. On this site, you can find my thoughts on my projects, experiences, and other general ideas that interest me. As a software developer, I’ve interned at Amazon, Samsung, and WiseSponsor, and have worked on a variety of projects ranging from full-stack web development to machine learning.
